prompt: A cinematic, photorealistic wide shot of a lone hiker in a dark, waterproof parka standing on a rugged, muddy mountain ridge enveloped in dense, swirling white fog. Visibility is only a few feet. The hiker is looking down at their boots, where a thin stream of clear rainwater is trickling over dark, wet stones. The hiker is extending one leg to step precisely along the steepest downward path the water is taking. No text, no diagrams, no floating elements. 8k resolution, National Geographic style photography.
metaphor: A hiker in a thick mountain mist, unable to see the valley, cautiously stepping in the exact direction that a small trickle of rainwater flows downward.
